hero.name: Victor Theodoro
hero.description: A passionate developer creating solutions that transform lives. Specialized in modern, scalable web and mobile solutions focused on real impact.

about.title: About Me
about.bio: I am a developer passionate about impact technology, recognized as a software engineer for the complexity of the solutions I deliver. My path of excellence began at ETEC de Registro — elected the 3rd best public school in the state of SP — where I created WACS, an internationally award-winning intelligent wheelchair automation ecosystem.
about.bio2: Currently, I am studying Multiplatform Systems Development at FATEC de Registro, combining a solid academic foundation with practical experience in scalable systems. I constantly seek to solve complex problems through clean code and modern architecture.

services.title: Services
services.subtitle: Tailored software engineering solutions
services.websites_desc: Modern institutional websites and high-conversion landing pages. Responsive design, optimized for SEO and performance.
services.mobile_desc: Multiplatform apps with React Native for iOS and Android. Intuitive interface and native experience.
services.systems_desc: Tailored fullstack platforms. From database to interface, robust systems for your business.
services.iot_desc: Intelligent solutions with Arduino, sensors, and IoT integration. Home and industrial automation.
services.step1_desc: A deep dive into your problem to design the ideal technical solution.
services.step2_desc: Modular planning focusing on scalability, security, and user experience.
services.step3_desc: Coding with sprints, continuous testing, and focus on real performance.
services.step4_desc: Optimized deployment, monitoring, and support for product growth.
services.cta: Looking for a software engineer for your idea?
